496f0303d899.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
496f0303d899.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
496f0303d899.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

561847f03d8b.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
561847f03d8b.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
561847f03d8b.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

3b36809194c0.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
3b36809194c0.description: At 3.9/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
3b36809194c0.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

67fca4401c76.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
67fca4401c76.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

23a60a8a27f9.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
23a60a8a27f9.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
23a60a8a27f9.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

30cff3064f0c.title: Ranked #10 of 18 locally — peers are ahead
30cff3064f0c.description: At percentile 47.1, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

eae2ae474e5c.title: Harder to book/find than competitors — friction losing customers
eae2ae474e5c.description: You trail peers by 2.0 points on conversion. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

436bf572509c.title: Accelerate review volume — you're credible but not dominant
436bf572509c.description: At 95 reviews, your rating is stable but not commanding. Venues with 200+ reviews rank higher in Maps. A post-visit review prompt would compound monthly.
